1.texto_original: E viu-se um grande sinal no céu: uma mulher vestida do sol, tendo a lua debaixo dos seus pés, e uma coroa de doze estrelas sobre a sua cabeça.
1.normal:
Devotional Study of Apocalipse 12:1

"E viu-se um grande sinal no céu: uma mulher vestida do sol, tendo a lua debaixo dos seus pés, e uma coroa de doze estrelas sobre a sua cabeça."

This verse carries deep theological significance. The original Hebrew/Greek text reveals layers of meaning that illuminate Gods character and purposes. The context within the broader narrative provides essential framework for understanding.

The historical backdrop adds richness to interpretation. Archaeological discoveries continue to confirm and illuminate the cultural setting in which these words were written.

For the modern reader, this verse offers both comfort and challenge. It invites us to trust in Gods sovereign plan while actively living out its principles in daily life.
1.academico:
Exegetical Analysis of Apocalipse 12:1

Philological Analysis

"E viu-se um grande sinal no céu: uma mulher vestida do sol, tendo a lua debaixo dos seus pés, e uma coroa de doze estrelas sobre a sua cabeça."

The original language presents significant lexical and syntactic elements. Key terms reveal theological distinctions often lost in translation.

Historical-Critical Context

Source criticism and form criticism illuminate the compositional history. The Sitz im Leben reflects socio-religious dynamics of antiquity.

Theological Implications

This verse contributes to covenant theology, divine sovereignty, human responsibility, and eschatological hope.

Archaeological Evidence

Recent discoveries from the ancient Near East provide material context for interpreting this passage.
1.ninos:
🌟 Amazing Story! 🌈

Hey kids! 🚀 Today we learn something super cool from the Bible! ✨

"E viu-se um grande sinal no céu: uma mulher vestida do sol, tendo a lua debaixo dos seus pés, e uma coroa de doze estrelas sobre a sua cabeça."

This verse teaches us something really important about God 💝. He loves us SO much! 🌟

Think about it: just like an artist 🎨 carefully paints every detail, God carefully created everything — including YOU! 😊

Fun Activity: Draw your favorite thing God created! 🖍️🙏❤️

Hey kids! 🚀 Today we learn something super cool from the Bible! ✨

"E foram dadas à mulher as duas asas da grande águia, para que voasse para o deserto, ao seu lugar, onde é sustentada por um tempo, e tempos, e metade de um tempo, fora da vista da serpente."

This verse teaches us something really important about God 💝. He loves us SO much! 🌟

Think about it: just like an artist 🎨 carefully paints every detail, God carefully created everything — including YOU! 😊

Fun Activity: Draw your favorite thing God created! 🖍️🙏❤️

15.texto_original: E a serpente lançou da sua boca, atrás da mulher, água como um rio, para fazer que ela fosse arrebatada pela corrente.
15.normal:
Devotional Study of Apocalipse 12:15

"E a serpente lançou da sua boca, atrás da mulher, água como um rio, para fazer que ela fosse arrebatada pela corrente."

This verse carries deep theological significance. The original Hebrew/Greek text reveals layers of meaning that illuminate Gods character and purposes. The context within the broader narrative provides essential framework for understanding.

The historical backdrop adds richness to interpretation. Archaeological discoveries continue to confirm and illuminate the cultural setting in which these words were written.

For the modern reader, this verse offers both comfort and challenge. It invites us to trust in Gods sovereign plan while actively living out its principles in daily life.
15.academico:
Exegetical Analysis of Apocalipse 12:15

Philological Analysis

"E a serpente lançou da sua boca, atrás da mulher, água como um rio, para fazer que ela fosse arrebatada pela corrente."

The original language presents significant lexical and syntactic elements. Key terms reveal theological distinctions often lost in translation.

Historical-Critical Context

Source criticism and form criticism illuminate the compositional history. The Sitz im Leben reflects socio-religious dynamics of antiquity.

Theological Implications

This verse contributes to covenant theology, divine sovereignty, human responsibility, and eschatological hope.

Archaeological Evidence

Recent discoveries from the ancient Near East provide material context for interpreting this passage.

16.texto_original: A terra, porém acudiu à mulher; e a terra abriu a boca, e tragou o rio que o dragão lançara da sua boca.
16.normal:
Devotional Study of Apocalipse 12:16

"A terra, porém acudiu à mulher; e a terra abriu a boca, e tragou o rio que o dragão lançara da sua boca."

This verse carries deep theological significance. The original Hebrew/Greek text reveals layers of meaning that illuminate Gods character and purposes. The context within the broader narrative provides essential framework for understanding.

The historical backdrop adds richness to interpretation. Archaeological discoveries continue to confirm and illuminate the cultural setting in which these words were written.

17.texto_original: E o dragão irou-se contra a mulher, e foi fazer guerra aos demais filhos dela, os que guardam os mandamentos de Deus, e mantêm o testemunho de Jesus.E o dragão parou sobre a areia do mar.
17.normal:
Devotional Study of Apocalipse 12:17

"E o dragão irou-se contra a mulher, e foi fazer guerra aos demais filhos dela, os que guardam os mandamentos de Deus, e mantêm o testemunho de Jesus.E o dragão parou sobre a areia do mar."

This verse carries deep theological significance. The original Hebrew/Greek text reveals layers of meaning that illuminate Gods character and purposes. The context within the broader narrative provides essential framework for understanding.

The historical backdrop adds richness to interpretation. Archaeological discoveries continue to confirm and illuminate the cultural setting in which these words were written.

For the modern reader, this verse offers both comfort and challenge. It invites us to trust in Gods sovereign plan while actively living out its principles in daily life.
